title: The Original Work: Programmer Art
description:
The Original Work is a texture pack that wants to cotinuate the programmers art aka the original textures from minecraft but also changing the new stuff!

The official textures of the mod:
The Broken Script!
body:
# ![tow](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8c91b220066b2891945383f023d62f27516c26cf.png)

   The Original Work is a Minecraft texture pack that imagines a world where Minecraft never received a texture update. Inspired by the game’s classic pixel art, this pack stays true to the original charm of Minecraft’s pre-1.14 textures while refining and enhancing them in subtle ways. Blocks, items, and mobs retain their nostalgic appearance, preserving the  design choices that longtime players remember. 

   Whether you’re a veteran seeking a trip down memory lane or a new player curious about how Minecraft once looked, The Original Work brings back the timeless aesthetic of the game’s earliest days—no modern changes, just pure, Old Minecraft.


Requires:

- [Continuity](https://modrinth.com/mod/continuity)
- [Entity Model Features](https://modrinth.com/mod/entity-model-features)
- [Entity Textures Features](https://modrinth.com/mod/entitytexturefeatures)
- [Puzzle](https://modrinth.com/mod/puzzle)
- or Optifine

This Texture pack was made so you could see Minecraft how it once was this texture isn't just a re-texture of new blocks and items so they look old it want's to make it so it also fuctions like Old Minecraft 

(like how the Raw Iron, Gold and Copper have blocks insted of raw ores textures)
